studimet.title: Applications outside Switzerland
studimet.intro: Below you’ll find information and notes about studying in Zurich (University of Zurich – UZH and ETH Zurich):
studimet.techNote: Example ETH Zurich: open the «Master electrical engineering and information technology» page — it lists extra documents (GRE, English certificate, etc.). Our experience: applicants with a public high-school diploma or bachelor’s from institutions like the University of Tirana or University of Prishtina often have more realistic chances.
studimet.financeIntro: Finally: without funds, little is possible. Information about living costs, applications, semester fees, scholarships, etc. is here:
studimet.closing: Please read all the links above before sending an extra question. Shoqata Studenti does not offer financial aid. Applying takes work — we hope you have the will, time, and motivation to meet the requirements. Good luck!

infoPage.title: Info
infoPage.p1: From around 2000, a group of Albanian-speaking students met informally. Only a year after the war in Kosovo and on the eve of conflict in the Albanian-speaking part of North Macedonia, they founded the Albanian student association «Studenti».
infoPage.p2: The context was bleak — even tragic — including members who were imprisoned for distributing books.
infoPage.p3: Today things are different. «Studenti» is and remains built by and for Albanian-speaking students in Zurich — an information, networking, and advocacy platform.

history.title: History
history.body: This page will later include videos and images about the association’s history.

vargjet.title: Vargjet e lira
vargjet.intro: Topics with texts to open in the browser or download (PDF, TXT, Word).
vargjet.clubIntro: "Vargjet e Lira" is the literary club of Shoqata Studenti. It hosts readings, discussions, and reflections on Albanian literature as well as cultural, historical, and social themes.
vargjet.clubGoal: The project aims to create an open space for critical thinking, culture, and discussion among students.
vargjet.noThemes: No topics have been added for this section yet.
vargjet.noDocuments: There are no files for this topic yet.
vargjet.kulturaTeaser: Poetry and texts organised by topic — each file can be opened or downloaded.

alumni.intro: Our Alumni program aims to keep strong ties between former students and the current Shoqata Studenti community. Through this network, members gain opportunities to exchange experiences, build connections, and support each other across generations.
alumni.dinner: Every year, a traditional alumni dinner is also organized as a meeting point and a way to reconnect with our community.

sport.intro: Shoqata Studenti organizes weekly sports activities for students and its members. Meetings take place once a week in Oerlikon, Halle 8, alternating between volleyball and football.
sport.goal: The project aims to strengthen the social and community side of the association through sport and physical activity.

collaborations.intro: Shoqata Studenti regularly collaborates with Albanian professional organizations and networks in Switzerland, with the goal of building bridges between students and Albanian professionals from different fields.
collaborations.summary: These collaborations include events, discussions, networking, and joint academic and professional activities.

federata.heading: Federation of Albanian Student Associations in Switzerland
federata.intro: Shoqata Studenti is part of the Federation of Albanian Student Associations in Switzerland, a network that brings together eight Albanian student associations from different Swiss cities. The federation serves as a platform for coordination and collaboration among Albanian students at the national Swiss level.
federata.representation: Shoqata Studenti is represented in the federation through its delegates and participates in annual meetings, joint projects, and national-level student initiatives.
federata.activities: Within the federation, trips, events, and various collaborations are also organized among the participating associations.
